chapter_title.ar: باب مَا تَزَوَّجَ عَلَيْهِ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 45 – What Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> got married upon with Fatima<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/103)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/103)
text: زَوَّجَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَلِيّاً فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) عَلَى دِرْعٍ حُطَمِيَّةٍ يُسَاوِي ثَلَاثِينَ دِرْهَماً .

en.hubeali: One of our companions, from Ali Bin Al Husayn, from Al Abbas Bin Aamir, from Abdullah Bin Bukeyr,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> got Fatima<sup>asws</sup> married to Ali<sup>asws</sup> upon a (dower of a) cracked shield valued at thirty Dirhams’.
en.sarwar: 4. Certain persons of our people have narrated from Ali ibn al-Husayn from al-‘Abbas ibn ‘Amir ‘Abd Allah ibn Bukayr who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, arranged the marriage of Fatimah and Ali, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, for a mahr (dower) from one shield made by Hatmiyah (a certain people) valued at thirty dirham.’”
